label: Pricebook Entry
description: Links Products to Pricebooks with associated unit prices. Required to associate products with Opportunities via OpportunityLineItems and to support MLC Asset and product bundle cost calculations.
migrationNotes: PricebookEntry records must be migrated in conjunction with Product2 records. Validate that all active products have entries in the Standard Pricebook. Required for Opportunity product associations.

relationships.description: PricebookEntry references a Product2 record via Product2Id
PricebookEntry references a Pricebook2 record via Pricebook2Id

source: Meridian Leasing - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration Design Document (Magna Technology Group, May 2026)
